creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Budapest travel mistakes to avoid ❌ 

Budapest is one of my all time favourite cities to go for a weekend break in Europe, but there ARE a couple of things you definitely need to know before visiting the Hungarian capital 🇭🇺

#budapest #traveltips

transcription.text: Don't make these common tourist mistakes when you're going to Budapest. Don't just go to Simpler Kert. I'm not saying you shouldn't visit the famous Ruin Bar, because Simpler is actually pretty cool, and even though it's mainly catering to tourists nowadays, it's a nice place to go for a few beers. But there are so many other fantastic bars in Budapest. Don't get on public transport without validating your ticket. Public transport in Budapest is absolutely fantastic, and it's pretty cheap too. So remember to always validate your ticket before boarding, or just use the excellent Budapest Go app, and then you can't go wrong. Don't take a freelancer taxi. I've made a whole video on this, but never ever take a taxi that says freelancer on the side. Just use the Bolt app and you won't get scammed, or just use the excellent network of buses, trams and the metro. Don't assume that you can get a table at the good restaurants on the day. There are many 10 out of 10 restaurants in Budapest, but a lot of them are fully booked weeks in advance. So make sure you do a bit of planning, and book ahead if you've got your eyes on a specific restaurant in Budapest.
